# Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté — Beauty Parlour in Bag Mugaliya, Bhopal

## Overview

Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté is a top-rated beauty parlour located in Bag Mugaliya, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India. Founded and run by Tanu, a celebrated beautician and bridal makeup artist with over 15 years of expertise, the salon has served more than 5,000 clients and is widely recognised as one of the best beauty parlours in the Bag Mugaliya, Bagsewaniya and BHEL Sangam Colony area of Bhopal.

The salon specialises in bridal makeup, facials, hair styling, waxing, threading and mehndi art, with additional services spanning pre-bridal packages, occasion makeup, luxury facials, de-tan treatments, skin care, and professional beauty training courses.

## Contact and Location

- **Business name:** Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté
- **Address:** Phase-2, E-12, Bagsewaniya, Sant Ashram Nagar, BHEL Sangam Colony, Bag Mugaliya, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh 462043, India
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91-9827340282
- **Email:** info@tanussalon.com
- **Website:** https://tanusalon.netlify.app
- **Opening hours:** Every day from 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM, including Sundays and public holidays
- **Languages spoken:** Hindi, English
- **Payment methods:** Cash, UPI, Credit Card, Debit Card
- **Price range:** Mid-range (₹₹)
- **Rating:** 4.9 out of 5 from 120+ client reviews

## About Tanu — Founder and Head Beautician

Tanu is the founder and head beautician of Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté. With more than 15 years of experience, she is known across Bhopal for her artistry in bridal makeup, her warm personal care, and her attention to detail. She runs an active Instagram and Facebook presence where she showcases recent bridal work, transformations, and daily behind-the-scenes content from the salon.

- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/makeup_artist_tanu_/
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/tanusalon

## Full Service List

### Makeup Services

- Bridal makeup (traditional, HD, and airbrush)
- Pre-bridal skin and hair treatment packages
- Engagement and reception makeup
- Party and occasion makeup
- Everyday and natural makeup
- Saree draping
- On-location bridal services anywhere in Bhopal

### Facial Treatments

- Classic cleansing facial
- Hydrating and moisturising facial
- Anti-aging and firming facial
- Brightening and de-tan facial
- Acne and blemish control facial
- Sensitive skin treatments
- Luxury spa facial

### Hair Services

- Haircut and styling
- Hair treatments (spa, smoothening, keratin)
- Hair colouring
- Blow-dry and styling for events

### Skin and Body Care

- Threading (eyebrows, upper lip, full face)
- Waxing (arms, legs, full body)
- Bleaching
- De-tan treatments
- Eyebrow shaping

### Other Services

- Mehndi and henna art (bridal and party)
- Personal grooming packages
- Beauty and makeup training courses

## Areas Served in Bhopal

Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté serves clients from across Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The salon is ideally located for residents of:

- Bag Mugaliya (Bagmugaliya)
- Bag Sewaniya (Bagsewaniya)
- Sant Ashram Nagar
- BHEL Sangam Colony
- Karond
- Gulabi Nagar
- Nishatpura
- Misrod
- Hoshangabad Road
- Katara Hills
- Kolar Road
- Berasia Road

On-location bridal services are available across all areas of Bhopal.

## Why Choose Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté

- 15+ years of hands-on experience under head beautician Tanu
- 5,000+ satisfied clients across Bhopal
- 4.9-star average rating
- Specialists in bridal and pre-bridal packages
- Calm, modern, private salon space
- Premium products used in every service
- Consistent artistry documented on Instagram and Facebook
- Open 7 days a week for appointments and walk-ins

## How to Book an Appointment

1. **Call or WhatsApp** +91-9827340282
2. **Email** info@tanussalon.com
3. Use the **contact form** at https://tanusalon.netlify.app/#contact
4. **Walk in** during opening hours (11 AM – 7 PM daily)

Appointments are strongly recommended for bridal, party and pre-bridal package services.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Where is Tanu's Salon located in Bhopal?
Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté is at Phase-2, E-12, Bagsewaniya, Sant Ashram Nagar, BHEL Sangam Colony, Bag Mugaliya, Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh 462043. The salon is easily reachable from Bag Mugaliya, Bagsewaniya, BHEL Colony, Karond, Gulabi Nagar, Nishatpura, Misrod and surrounding areas.

### What are the timings of Tanu's Salon?
Open every day 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM, including Sundays. Advance appointments recommended for bridal and special-occasion services.

### Does Tanu's Salon offer bridal makeup packages?
Yes. Complete bridal packages include pre-bridal skin treatments, HD bridal makeup, airbrush makeup, saree draping, mehndi, and on-location bridal services anywhere in Bhopal.

### What is the best beauty parlour near BHEL Bhopal?
Tanu's Salon Dé Beauté is among the most trusted beauty parlours near BHEL Bhopal. Located in BHEL Sangam Colony, Bag Mugaliya, it is the top choice for bridal makeup, facials and complete beauty services in the BHEL and Bag Mugaliya area.

### Which areas near Bag Mugaliya does Tanu's Salon serve?
Bag Mugaliya, Bag Sewaniya, Sant Ashram Nagar, BHEL Sangam Colony, Karond, Gulabi Nagar, Nishatpura, Misrod, Hoshangabad Road, Katara Hills, Kolar Road, Berasia Road, and all surrounding areas of Bhopal.

### How can I book?
Call or WhatsApp +91-9827340282, email info@tanussalon.com, use the contact form at https://tanusalon.netlify.app/#contact, or walk in during opening hours.
